name: Peruvian Potato & Chicken Platter
recipeIngredient: Jalapeno peppers, quartered lengthwise (fresh or canned)
Chicken breasts, boneless and skinless (1 pound)
Red bell pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine broth, potatoes, lemons, jalapeno peppers, and cumin.
2. Bring to boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat and cover.
3. Cook for 5 minutes until boiling subsides.
4. Add chicken; return to boil, then cover and cook about 15 minutes longer until potatoes are tender and juices run clear when chicken is pierced.
5. Remove from heat; stir in cilantro.
6. Drain potatoes and chicken, reserving broth.
7. Discard cilantro, jalapenos, and lemons.
8. Assemble by mounding potatoes in the center of a platter.
9. Shred chicken and arrange on the platter with remaining ingredients except reserved broth and salsa.
10. Serve reserved broth in a sauceboat and salsa in a bowl on the side.
